system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

args.command: wc -c ~/haystack.txt 2>/dev/null || wc -c haystack.txt 2>/dev/null || ls -la haystack.txt 2>/dev/null || find . -name "haystack.txt" 2>/dev/null | head -5

args.description: Find decoy paragraphs with entity names

tool_returns.detail:
105:The auxiliary schedule of Larren was formally recorded in the spring 1995 catalogue along with seven adjacent storage entries covering the preliminary oversight period.
749:Independent reviewers noted that Ironwell allocation archives from 1996 were consistent with dispatch entries logged in the autumn oversight bulletin under the preliminary review framework.
801:Local archives indicate the Maerstone register register was last updated in winter 2011 with a tertiary addendum covering register adjustments approved by the preliminary review committee.
881:Field surveys conducted in spring 2005 placed the Jorrith preliminary ledger measure at moderate levels with 142.5 as the reported central tendency for summary sub-categories under continued review.
967:Regional observers in Larren noted a preliminary pattern of manifest during the winter 2013 cycle that prompted a annual addendum filed by the inventory secretariat for archival reference.
1221:Independent reviewers noted that Maerstone catalogue archives from 1981 were consistent with storage entries logged in the autumn oversight bulletin under the preliminary review framework.
1273:The preliminary dispatch working group reviewed Larren entries in their 1996 session and approved 971.6 routine allocation updates pending the autumn compilation of the consolidated record.
1489:Field notes from summer 1987 include observations on the Jorrith directory cycle and ancillary catalogue markers that informed the preliminary review prepared by the regional secretariat.
1695:The winter 2004 edition catalogued the Maerstone preliminary inventory systematically alongside rotation cross-references and notes on the perennial reorganisation completed during the previous reporting interval.
1915:The Ironwell dispatch board issued a preliminary bulletin for the 2016 cycle outlining the winter review of index entries flagged for preliminary reassessment under the standing protocol.
2055:Local archives indicate the Maerstone register register was last updated in autumn 2014 with a marginal addendum covering frequency adjustments approved by the preliminary review committee.
2283:According to the 2020 field report compiled by the regional bureau, the allocation index for Larren stood at 192.0 units after the spring survey, with preliminary variations noted in subsequent storage addenda.
2327:Auditors confirmed the Jorrith allocation entries for 1996 were properly catalogued and cross-checked against ledger duplicates flagged in the spring review issued by the preliminary verification panel.
2521:Regional observers in Ironwell noted a preliminary pattern of bulletin during the winter 1991 cycle that prompted a sectional addendum filed by the schedule secretariat for archival reference.
2935:The Maerstone compendium board issued a preliminary bulletin for the 1987 cycle outlining the spring review of roster entries flagged for eastern reassessment under the standing protocol.
3849:The 2012 spring compilation of Maerstone rotation records included 907.1 register cross-references and a preliminary appendix prepared for the regional documentary archive.
4241:The spring 2015 edition catalogued the Ironwell seasonal rotation systematically alongside schedule cross-references and notes on the preliminary reorganisation completed during the previous reporting interval.
4717:Auditors confirmed the Jorrith summary entries for 2002 were properly catalogued and cross-checked against index duplicates flagged in the spring review issued by the preliminary verification panel.
4803:The Ironwell storage board issued a transitional bulletin for the 1982 cycle outlining the spring review of manifest entries flagged for preliminary reassessment under the standing protocol.

args.command:
python3 -c "
import hashlib
s = 'Ironwell=K-2210|Jorrith=K-3306|Kilthorne=K-4499|Larren=K-5588|Maerstone=K-6677'
print('String:', repr(s))
digest = hashlib.sha1(s.encode('utf-8')).hexdigest()
print('SHA1:', digest)
"
args.description: Compute SHA-1 hash of the joined pairs string
